Article Title: How to get your CIBIL credit score without a PAN card
Article Text:
Your credit score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity.

What is a CIBIL score?

How to get your CIBIL Credit score without a PAN Card

Factors affecting your CIBIL score

CIBIL credit score : Understanding your creditworthiness is pivotal in today's financial landscape, especially when seeking loans or credit cards. The Credit Information Bureau (India) Limited, commonly known as CIBIL, plays an important role in this regard by providing credit scores to borrowers.According to ET, credit score helps banks make informed decisions about extending credit cards and loans. Your credit history influences your CIBIL score , which is calculated using a special method.Your CIBIL score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity. Ranging from 300 to 900, a higher score indicates a stronger likelihood of loan approval. Banks and financial institutions use this score to assess the risk associated with lending money.1. Go to the official CIBIL website and click on 'Personal CIBIL score,' then 'Get Your Free CIBIL score.' Follow the link provided and fill in all the required details.2. If you don’t have a PAN Card, you can use an alternative identification such as Passport, Voter ID, Driver’s License, or Ration Card. Enter the number of the chosen ID.3. Provide your date of birth, PIN code, and select your state. Finally, enter your mobile number and click on ‘Accept and Continue’.4. Authenticate your identity by entering the OTP (One-Time Password) delivered to your mobile device on the next screen. Click 'Continue' to proceed.5. Choose whether you want to link the device with your account. Select 'Yes' or 'No' based on your preference.6. Upon successful registration, you will see a page confirming that 'You have successfully registered!'7. Click on ‘Go to Dashboard’ to access and view your CIBIL score.The factors influencing the new CIBIL score, as stated on the CIBIL website, include:1. Depth of credit: This refers to the duration of your existing credit history, calculated from the opening date of your oldest credit account.2. Long-term trend of outstanding balances: The overall trend of outstanding balances over time affects your score.3. Transaction history on credit cards: How you manage transactions on your credit cards impacts your score.4. Ratio of actual repayment amount to total amount due: This ratio indicates your repayment behavior and influences your score accordingly.5. Number of new accounts opened and number of accounts closed: Opening or closing accounts can affect your score, so managing these actions wisely is important.
Article Summary: Your CIBIL score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity. Ranging from 300 to 900, a higher score indicates a stronger likelihood of loan approval. Banks and financial institutions use this score to assess the risk associated with lending money.

Article Title: Why WWE 2K26 is getting negative reviews
Article Text:
Image via 2K Games

WWE 2K26 review bombed upon its March 13 release



Image via Steam

WWE 2K26 community backlash



“Battlepass stuff in a free to play game is something I've never done but understand. Battlepass stuff in paid game is dumb as all hell. Battlepass stuff in a paid game where they're literally taking things that were free last year, locking it behind the battlepass is downright insanity.”

“Good, let it rot.”

WWE 2K26 has received a significantly negative reception from players and critics, with the game currently sitting at a 51% positive review score on Steam. This is a massive drop compared to last year’s WWE 2K25, which received a great reception from the communityEssentially, the overwhelming majority of negative reviews focus on the "Ringside Pass," a battle pass system. This disastrous release has disappointed the entire community and also prompted comparisons to WWE 2K20, which is considered to be one of the worst entries in the franchise.The section below takes a detailed look at why WWE 2K26 is getting negative reviewsWWE 2K26 was expected to be a breath of fresh air, and with CM Punk being in the spotlight, fans had a lot of expectations. Although the game, in its fundamentals, isn’t bad, the community still ended up being quite disappointed.The central complaint centers on 2K implementing battle pass mechanics in a premium, full-priced game, which is a practice many consider unfair. Players who have already ended up paying $60-$150 for the game are now confronted with additional paywalls that lock previously free content.This approach has created a perfect storm of frustration, as players must choose between grinding excessively or spending more money on a game they already purchased at full price.Essentially, the Ringside Pass is a fundamental shift in WWE 2K's monetization philosophy, introducing locking mechanics that have led to widespread criticism and boycott calls from fans who feel exploited by the company's aggressive business practices.The primary concern about wrestlers being behind a paywall is that they were freely available in previous WWE 2K titles, making the system feel predatory. This is a step backward in consumer-friendly design.Besides the Ringside Pass, another major concern for the fans was the bugs that resulted in a poor gaming experience. It is expected that the developers make some changes, given the reception from the community.Reddit users and Steam reviewers have expressed fury over the game. Players have noted that 2K slowed down the progression speed, making the grind even more painful for legitimate players. Added to this, the developers prioritized patching workarounds over addressing fundamental design flaws.This is a clear example of misplaced priorities, and something like this wasn’t expected from 2K Games. Here is what Reddit user GaryKingoftheWorld had to say about the game:Another user, switfy19946, said:The reception on other social media platforms like X was also not that positive, with fans expressing their disappointment there as well.
Article Summary: WWE 2K26 has received a significantly negative reception from players and critics. The game currently sits at a 51% positive review score on Steam. This is a massive drop compared to last year’s WWE 2K25, which received a great reception.
